metadata.name: Integrate a Satellite with a Launch Vehicle

description: Engineers at a launch site must physically mount a satellite onto the launch vehicle's payload adapter.

nodes.task_description: Verify that both the satellite and the payload adapter have passed all pre-integration checks.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the status of all checks is 'complete'.

nodes.task_description: Oversee the crane operation to lift and position the satellite onto the adapter.

expected_outcome.value: Agent monitors the physical process to ensure it follows the procedure.

nodes.task_description: Connect the umbilical cords for data and power between the satellite and the launch vehicle, and perform a final interface check.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms all connections are secure and a successful data link is established.
